# Beorn's Rage

> [!danger] ⚔️ Event · Cost: **1** · Tactics

![[19005.png]]

---

**Response:** After a **_Beorning**_ character is declared as an attacker or defender against an enemy, that enemy gets -2 ATK and -2 DEF until the end of the phase.
